__inputs.name: DS_CLICKHOUSE
__inputs.label: ClickHouse
__inputs.description: Grafana ClickHouse datasource connected to the OpenTelemetry database.

panels.title: Request volume
panels.description: Counter-like checkout request metric over time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, sum(Value) AS value FROM otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'checkout.requests' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Error spans
panels.description: Number of error spans for the selected service.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(Timestamp) AS time, count() AS value FROM otel_traces WHERE ServiceName = '$service' AND StatusCode = 'Error' AND Timestamp >= $__fromTime AND Timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Slow spans
panels.description: Spans slower than 500 ms for the selected service.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(Timestamp) AS time, count() AS value FROM otel_traces WHERE ServiceName = '$service' AND Duration > 500 * 1000 * 1000 AND Timestamp >= $__fromTime AND Timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Recent slow or failed spans
panels.description: Representative spans that should lead into trace and log investigation.

targets.rawSql: SELECT Timestamp, TraceId, SpanName, Duration, StatusCode, StatusMessage FROM otel_traces WHERE ServiceName = '$service' AND (StatusCode = 'Error' OR Duration > 500 * 1000 * 1000) AND Timestamp >= $__fromTime AND Timestamp <= $__toTime ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Recent error logs
panels.description: Structured logs that can be correlated to traces by TraceId.

targets.rawSql: SELECT Timestamp, TraceId, SeverityText, Body, LogAttributes['failure.reason'] AS reason FROM otel_logs WHERE ServiceName = '$service' AND SeverityText IN ('ERROR', 'FATAL') AND Timestamp >= $__fromTime AND Timestamp <= $__toTime ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
